product_title: Bush Business Furniture Move 40 Series 48"w Electric Height Adjustable Standing Desk, Modern Hickory/cool Gray (m4s4824mhsk)
consensus_summary: The Bush Move 40 Series standing desk is a mid-range option that offers good value with solid construction and reliable electric height adjustment. Users appreciate the spacious work surface and modern aesthetics, though some report concerns about stability at maximum height and motor noise. It's well-suited for budget-conscious buyers seeking a functional standing desk without premium features.
pros: Spacious 48-inch work surface provides ample workspace
Smooth electric height adjustment with memory presets
Modern design fits contemporary office aesthetics
Solid build quality and sturdy frame construction
Good value for mid-range price point
Stable at typical seated and standing heights
cons: Some wobbling reported at maximum height extension
Limited weight capacity compared to premium models
Desktop can be thin, may require added reinforcement
Motor occasionally slow on initial startup
No built-in monitor arm or accessories included
Control pad buttons may feel less responsive over time
red_flags: Stability concerns at extended heights may affect typing comfort
Desktop durability questions raised by some long-term users
